meaning: 苏库尔[巴基斯坦东南部城市]
examples: Mr. Zardari flew to the southern city of Sukkur on Thursday to assess the damage and the relief operation.
"We were able to escape the floodwaters, but hunger may kill us," said Hora Mai, 40, sitting on a rain-soaked road in Sukkur along with hundreds of other people.
Businesses were closed down across other cities in the Sindh province, especially Hyderabad, Sukkur, Khairpur and Larkana.
The match was organised by a local sports association in Sukkur, a city in the southern province of Sindh.
The official Pakistan Television Corporation only showed brief footage of Mr Zardari at the flood barrier, and of him visiting a camp for 2, 500 displaced people at a women's college in Sukkur.
